message:
fix: let compaction event handler be sole owner of history update

The runCompaction method redundantly set this.history = snapshot before
emitting the compaction event, whose handler already correctly sets
this.history = [Msg.user(summary)]. Remove the redundant assignment
and let the event handler be the single source of truth.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
